items.caption: Comic strip panels from "Luck of the North" showing Gladstone Gander demonstrating his incredible luck to Donald Duck. In the sequence, a debt collector demands five dollars from Donald. Just as the collector threatens him, the wind blows a ten-dollar bill into Gladstone's hand, allowing him to pay the debt and keep five dollars in change, much to Donald's frustration.
items.md: ![Comic strip panels from "Luck of the North" showing Gladstone Gander demonstrating his incredible luck to Donald Duck. In the sequence, a debt collector demands five dollars from Donald.
